title: amauriopsis glandulosa
intro: Amauriopsis glandulosa, also known as Sticky Chile or Chilean Sticky Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Andes mountains in Chile and Argentina and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it has also been used to treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Amauriopsis glandulosa can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
